description_long: This object consists of a large, wooden, octagonal bucket with two prominent metal bands reinforcing its structure. Attached to the bucket is a wooden pole that supports a smaller, matching wooden bucket, suggesting a yoke or carrying mechanism. Several red, rectangular wooden panels with black bands and yellow triangular markings are positioned around the main bucket, some leaning against it and others lying flat on the ground. The wood grain is visible, and the construction appears sturdy, with the metal bands providing additional strength. The interior of the main bucket is open and hollow, suitable for holding liquids or other materials. The overall design is rustic and utilitarian, evoking traditional water-carrying or storage vessels often found in outdoor or communal urban settings.
description: A large, octagonal wooden bucket with metal bands, a yoke supporting a smaller bucket, and several red marked panels nearby. The design is rustic and functional, suitable for carrying or storing materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bucket's open top, metal bands, and red panels attached and leaning against it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden yoke with the smaller bucket suspended, and red panels lying on the ground.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the main bucket, metal bands, and more of the red panels on the ground.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the yoke and smaller bucket, with the red panels mostly visible on the ground behind.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops around main and small buckets
attribute_labeling_or_markings: yellow triangles and black bands on red panels
